message:
test(fuzz): RevocationSeal + SealValidation atomicity (0jqil)

Add fuzz_revocation_seal covering RevocationRegistry::check_with_seal /
validate_seal + RevocationSeal + SealValidation (revocation.rs:738-820).
These are the C1.1 check-use atomicity primitives that close the
TOCTOU window between revocation check and capability use — a seal
captures head_seq at check time and the operation re-validates at
commit time. Properties: seal captures registry head_seq + token_id +
checked_at + decision; validate_seal Valid path requires both token
match AND seq match; TokenMismatch takes precedence over Stale even
when the registry advanced; Stale carries both seal_seq and current_seq
verbatim; is_valid only true for Valid variant; check_with_seal
deterministic across repeated calls (modulo checked_at). Once-gated
anchors verify each branch including Revoked/NotRevoked decision and
the head-advance + cross-token precedence case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
